message:
fix(ci): add sibling dep clones to release and publish jobs

The Create Release job runs cargo metadata for version validation, and
the publish-crates job runs cargo publish — both need the sibling path
deps available. Add the same clone step to these jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -197,6 +197,13 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
 
+      - name: Clone sibling dependencies
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection.git ../franken_agent_detection
+
       - name: Download all artifacts
         uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093 # v4
         with:
@@ -357,6 +364,12 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
 
+      - name: Clone sibling dependencies
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection.git ../franken_agent_detection
+
       - name: Install Rust stable
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
